Who I Am

Professional at the heart of service

I am a trained waitress with two years of practical service experience across two distinct hospitality environments — a high-traffic city hotel in Kisumu and a resort setting in Siaya. This background has given me the ability to adapt quickly and perform consistently across different guest expectations and operational styles.

My work centres on accuracy, cleanliness, and genuine care for every guest I serve. I take orders carefully, relay them without error, manage multiple tables at the same time, and maintain a presentable dining area throughout every shift. I do not cut corners on hygiene or on how I present myself.

I am also a Diploma holder in Procurement and Logistics Management from KCA University, which gives me a structured understanding of how operations and supply chains work — a background that supports my awareness of stock, coordination, and service flow in a restaurant environment.

Additional Strengths
Available for evenings, weekends, and rotating shifts without drop in quality
Maintains high personal grooming and professional appearance at all times
Quick to learn new menus, POS systems, and service procedures
Comfortable with guests from diverse cultural and professional backgrounds
Fluent in English and Swahili — written and spoken
Consistent attendance and punctuality — always shows up prepared
Diploma in Procurement & Logistics — KCA University (2018–2022)
Work History

Where I have built my craft

Jan 2024 — Jan 2026
Waitress
Havana Hotel 📍 Kisumu, Kenya
  • Served guests across a high-traffic hotel dining room, managing several tables simultaneously while keeping service quality consistent throughout each shift.
  • Took and relayed food and beverage orders with accuracy, reducing errors between the kitchen and the table.
  • Maintained cleanliness and reset tables quickly between covers to keep service moving without gaps.
  • Handled guest requests and resolved minor complaints professionally, ensuring guests left satisfied.
  • Coordinated with kitchen staff to track order timing and flag special dietary needs, supporting timely food delivery.
  • Contributed to steady team operations during peak hours, stepping in wherever needed to keep things on track.
Jan 2023 — Dec 2023
Waitress
Dudi Resort 📍 Siaya, Kenya
  • Delivered table service to resort guests, creating a welcoming dining atmosphere from arrival through to the end of the meal.
  • Maintained hygiene and cleanliness standards across all front-of-house areas in line with hospitality requirements.
  • Set up dining spaces before each service session, ensuring professional presentation and a smooth start to every mealtime.
  • Served food and beverages efficiently while keeping a professional manner even during busy service periods.
  • Built positive relationships with returning guests through attentive service that encouraged repeat visits.
  • Followed standard service procedures consistently, ensuring uniformity in how guests were received and attended to.
